arts.ttl: Jack Grealish FINALLY scores for Manchester City after breaking 392-day goal drought in FA Cup clash with Salford City - but star can only conjure up a muted celebration
arts.sum: Jack Grealish finally broke his 392-day goal drought after netting for Man City in their third-round FA Cup clash with Salford.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Reason behind Kyle Walker's FA Cup absence as Pep Guardiola issues blunt three-word update on star's Etihad future amid 'links to Saudi Arabia'
arts.sum: The reason behind Kyle Walker 's surprise omission from Manchester City 's matchday squad for Saturday's FA Cup clash against minnows Salford has been revealed with Pep Guardiola coy.

arts.ttl: Man City star Savinho narrowly avoids injury after falling off the pitch into the photographer's pit following collision with Salford's Curtis Tilt
arts.sum: Manchester City star Savinho narrowly managed to avoid injury after falling into the photographer's pit during his side's FA Cup third round tie at home to Salford.

arts.ttl: I saw what Omar Marmoush did after latest Frankfurt goal amid growing Man City transfer interest
arts.sum: Manchester City are intent on taking Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush on a permanent transfer in January - but he is still scoring in Germany for the time being.

arts.ttl: Salford co-owner Gary Neville SKIPS club's biggest ever game away at Man City
arts.sum: League Two Salford City - owned by Manchester United's legendary Class of 92 - take on Manchester City in the FA Cup at The Etihad, with a number of the group opting to stay away

Previously at West Ham, Mubama made 18 senior appearances, including five in the Premier League, and scored one goal for the Hammers. Divin Mubama has been named in the starting XI of our FA Cup clash with League Two outfit Salford City.

arts.ttl: Why Kyle Walker is missing from Man City squad vs Salford in FA Cup
arts.sum: Manchester City named an experimental side to take on Salford in the FA Cup, with captain Kyle Walker notable in his absence all together.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd legend and Salford co-owner Ryan Giggs is in dugout for Man City clash
arts.sum: Ryan Giggs will assist Karl Robinson as he looks to guide Salford to a famous win over Premier League giants Manchester City in the third round of the FA Cup on Saturday night

arts.ttl: Player expected at Manchester City next week for medical – Club record deal being finalised
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov is expected at Manchester City at the start of next week to undergo a medical and complete his move from Lens. That’s according to journalist Fabrice Hawkins, who reports that the player has been left out of the Lens squad for the clash with Le Havre because of the impending move. arts.ttl: Manchester City’s first offer for player considered ‘low’ – Second bid incoming, club in no rush to sell
arts.sum: Manchester City’s offer for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis is considered ‘low’ at this moment in time because it’s not clear what is fixed and what will be bonuses. That’s according to journalist André Hernan who reports that the bid from Manchester City for the youngster is very much a ‘first offer’.
